item.title: Carole King
item.description: Genres: Pop soul, singer-songwriter, Girl group (as songwriter), folk pop Scenes: Brill Building (1958–1967), Laurel Canyon (1968–1975) Era: 1958–present (primary period: 1960–1971) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The opening chord of “I Feel the Earth Move” is a left-hand piano pattern that could be R&...

item.title: Gerry Goffin
item.description: Era: 1960s–1990s (primary period: 1960–1967) Genres: Girl group, Pop soul, Rock & roll, soul Key collaborator: Carole King (co-writer and wife, 1959–1968) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Gerry Goffin was the lyricist of the most prolific and versatile songwriting team in the Brill Building — the par...

item.title: Stevie Wonder
item.description: Genres: Soul, Pop soul, funk, art pop Scene: Detroit / Motown Records Era: 1961–present (primary period: 1971–1976) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify “I Was Made to Love Her” builds from a guitar riff into one of James Jamerson’s most propulsive bass lines and then Stevie Wonder’s voice arrives — a tenor ...

item.title: The Rolling Stones
item.description: Genres: British blues, blues rock, rock & roll, roots rock Scene: London (Richmond, then Soho) Era: 1962–present (primary period: 1968–1972) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Keith Richards plays behind the beat.
